title: Trump tells CNBC 'we are very intent on making a deal' with Iran
summary_full: U.S. President Donald Trump on Monday said he would order the military to postpone strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure for five days.
summary_public: U.S. President Donald Trump on Monday said he would order the military to postpone strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure for five days.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: postpone strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure
